sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa hang bek hi nuamlua ing
Kipak takin ka laam ka dianna
Ka Pasian hang hi nuamlua si!

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Thuman puanpi tawh kei hong tuam ta,
Phat loh theih loh dian loh theih loh,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zipipa puan hoih tawh kizem a
Tua bang teekin Topa'n hong zem ta

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa hoihna ke'n ka muh tak teh
Kam a gen zawh ding zong hi kei
Lai a at zawh ding zong hilo a
Lungsim leh Kha tawh phat ding hi.
